title: Tower of Hell Modifiers & Rings Quiz

questions.q: What happens when you collect all the rings in a Tower of Hell tower?
a: You get teleported to the top

questions.q: Which modifier makes your character move in slow motion?
What color are the rings you need to collect in Tower of Hell?
Which modifier flips your camera upside down?
How many rings are typically found in each Tower of Hell tower?
What does the 'Low Gravity' modifier do?
a: Makes you jump higher and fall slower

questions.q: Which modifier reduces your field of vision significantly?
What happens if you miss a ring while climbing the tower?
a: You can still get the badge by collecting the others

questions.q: Which modifier makes your character move extremely fast?
What is the purpose of modifiers in Tower of Hell?
a: To add extra challenges and variety
